title: stelis wendtii
intro: Stelis wendtii, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis wendtii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe respiratory tract irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
